creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The port is updated. 
After applying your patch, I made following changes: 

- Don't need to remove *.info-* in pre-build as it is done before  
remaking the info files. 
- Patch-ab is still needed since the info file gets installed under the 
category `GNU make' otherwise. 
- Instead of changing the executable's filename at the build time, 
do it by giving --program-transform-name to the configure script. 
(This should be possible by using --program-prefix option , but  
that causes the executable to be installed as ggmake ;( Maybe this  
is autoconf's bug.) 

There may be some more, but I forgot.
